extortion.description: LKE Group creates custom transport equipment for businesses across different industries. They design and build specialized gear that helps companies move materials, products, and goods more efficiently. From warehouse systems to industrial transport devices, LKE makes machines that solve real moving and handling challenges for factories, logistics centers, and manufacturing plants. Employees: 500 Revenue: $30.4  Million Industry: Architecture, Engineering & Design  Phone Number: +49 23650000000
